query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.loginMethod,
  cw.balance, cw.totalEarned, cw.totalSpent,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_sessions WHERE userId = u.id) as sessions_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM credit_transactions WHERE userId = u.id) as transactions_count
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN credit_wallets cw ON cw.userId = u.id
ORDER BY cw.totalSpent DESC;

LEFT JOIN credit_wallets cw ON cw.userId = u.id
